qualitative: major parity issue (live trade prints diverge materially from replay)
data issue (heartbeat freshness > 2 cycles, repeated NaN, stuck overlay)
execution bug (worker crash loop, position desync)

research_expectations.expected_cadence_trades_per_month: approximately 2 (volconf branch averages ~29 trades / 12 months in OOS walk-forward); 10/20/30 trade milestones map to roughly 5 / 10 / 15 months of forward paper data

replay_baseline_3mo.note: in-sample on the worst recent stretch; included as a sanity floor only, not as the success target. The 48mo/24mo/12mo walk-forward numbers above are the actual research expectations.

freeze_directive.no_changes_until: 30 closed trades after started_at OR severe failure tripwire (PF < 0.8 at >=10 trades, parity / data / execution failure)

review_cadence: weekly health check only — scripts/forward_test_tracker.py + scripts/monitor_strategy_decay.py
